Why Book With Amanda

The right person makes all the difference

Price Timing Expertise

Amanda monitors pricing windows year-round and alerts you when the perfect moment to book arrives — so you get the most for every dollar.

Elevation at Every Level

Even a $2,000 trip can feel like a million dollars with the right touches — upgrades, amenities, and insider access money alone can’t buy.

Complete Discretion

Your travel details and budget are handled with total privacy. A relationship built on trust from your very first inquiry.

The Person Behind Your Journey

Meet Amanda

Hi, I’m Amanda

Passionate about making
every moment elevated

I believe luxury isn’t a price tag — it’s a mindset. Whether you’re planning a cozy cabin getaway in the mountains, upgrading your all-inclusive experience, or embarking on an international adventure to savour the finer things in life, my mission is to make every trip feel extraordinary.

As a Canadian who travels across North America for work and spends every spare moment exploring the world — from Australia to Europe to the Caribbean — I’ve learned that the right booking transforms any trip into a memory that lasts a lifetime.

Luxury travel shouldn’t feel out of reach. I’m here to prove that it never was — and to be the person who unlocks it for you, whatever your budget looks like.

My approach to travel goes beyond the itinerary. A passion for exceptional dining — from celebrated Michelin star restaurants to the kind of hidden local gems that only insiders discover — is simply part of how I experience the world, and it’s something I love bringing to every trip I plan.

Global Explorer
Canada & Beyond
Every Detail Elevated
Fine Dining Curator
Luxury for Every Budget

Your Journey, Your Investment

The Getaway Escapes

Elevated Escapes

From $500 per person

Weekend cabin retreats, hot-weather quick shots, all-inclusive upgrades. Luxury isn’t about spending more — it’s about experiencing more.

  • Weekend & long weekend packages
  • All-inclusive resort upgrades
  • Cabin & mountain getaways
  • Room upgrade & amenity planning
  • Best-timing price alerts
Most Popular Journeys

Signature Journeys

$2,000 – $10,000 per person

Caribbean escapes, Mexican beach holidays, European city breaks, and cross-Canada adventures crafted with details that make all the difference.

  • Mexico, Dominican & Caribbean
  • Costa Rica & Central America
  • European city & cultural trips
  • Cross-Canada & US experiences
  • Boutique hotel curation
The Pinnacle Bespoke

Bespoke & Beyond

$10,000+ per person

  • Multi-country bespoke itineraries
  • Safari & expedition experiences
